mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{value} AND status != "cancelled" ORDER BY order_id DESC
SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY order_id DESC
SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, used_point, user_coupon_id, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at, cancel_reason, cancelled_at FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{value}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.option_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at,
p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL,
COALESCE(oi.option_name, po.option_name) AS option_name, IFNULL(oi.option_price, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) AS option_price,
(oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
LEFT JOIN product_options po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id
WHERE oi.order_item_id = #{order_item_id} AND o.user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( user_id, total_amount, used_point, user_coupon_id, address_id, status ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{total_amount}, #{used_point}, #{user_coupon_id}, #{address_id}, #{status} )

INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, product_id, option_id, price, quantity, status, option_name, option_price ) VALUES ( #{order_id}, #{product_id}, #{option_id}, #{price}, #{quantity}, 'PENDING', CASE WHEN #{option_id} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ( SELECT option_name FROM product_options WHERE option_id = #{option_id} ) END, CASE WHEN #{option_id} IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ( SELECT IFNULL(option_price, 0) FROM product_options WHERE option_id = #{option_id} ) END )
mapper.select:
SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.option_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at, p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL,
COALESCE(oi.option_name, po.option_name) AS option_name, IFNULL(oi.option_price, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) AS option_price,
(oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_options po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{value} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancel_reason}, cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
mapper.select: SELECT product_id FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{value} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status != 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) AS pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS paidCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'PREPARING' THEN 1 END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN 1 END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 END) AS confirmedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS cancelCount FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = #{value}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at, oi.option_id,
p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL,
COALESCE(oi.option_name, po.option_name) AS option_name, IFNULL(oi.option_price, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) AS option_price,
oi.quantity, oi.price, (oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_options po ON oi.option_id = po.option_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{order_id} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_items SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}

UPDATE order_items SET status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_item_id = #{order_item_id} AND status = 'DELIVERED' AND order_id IN ( SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{user_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.seller_id, uc.used_yn, c.coupon_name, c.discount_amount FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON c.coupon_id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{user_id} AND uc.used_yn = 'N' ORDER BY uc.issued_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_points ( user_id, point_balance ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_points SET point_balance = point_balance + #{point_amount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history ( user_id, order_item_id, point_amount, type ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{order_item_id}, #{point_amount}, 'EARN' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_coupons WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND used_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history ( user_id, order_item_id, point_amount, type ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, 0, #{point_amount}, 'USE' )
mapper.select: SELECT point_history_id, user_id, order_item_id, point_amount, type, created_at FROM point_history WHERE user_id = #{value} ORDER BY point_history_id DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{value} AND status = 'CANCELLED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE point_history SET order_id = #{order_id} WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND type = 'USE' AND order_id IS NULL ORDER BY point_history_id DESC LIMIT 1
UPDATE user_points SET point_balance = point_balance + #{point_amount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_history ( user_id, order_id, order_item_id, point_amount, type ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{order_id}, 0, #{point_amount}, 'REFUND' )
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.login_id, u.email, u.phone AS user_phone, o.total_amount, o.used_point, o.user_coupon_id, o.address_id, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at, o.cancel_reason, o.cancelled_at, pay.payment_id, pay.payment_method, pay.amount AS payment_amount, pay.status AS payment_status, pay.transaction_id, pay.created_at AS payment_created_at, a.recipient_name, a.phone AS receiver_phone, CONCAT( '[', IFNULL(a.zipcode, ''), '] ', IFNULL(a.address, ''), ' ', IFNULL(a.detail_address, '') ) AS delivery_address FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.user_id = o.user_id LEFT JOIN payments pay ON pay.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.address_id = o.address_id WHERE o.order_id = #{value}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, p.name AS product_name, oi.option_id, COALESCE(oi.option_name, po.option_name) AS option_name, IFNULL(oi.option_price, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0)) AS option_price, oi.price, oi.quantity, (oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotal_amount, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN product_options po ON po.option_id = oi.option_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{value} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
